title: Algebra Problem Set 1
instructions: Solve all problems showing your work. Partial credit will be given for correct methodology even if the final answer is incorrect.

title: Book Report: To Kill a Mockingbird
description: Write a 500-word analysis of themes in the novel
instructions: Analyze the major themes in 'To Kill a Mockingbird'. Focus on racism, justice, and moral growth. Include specific examples from the text to support your analysis.

title: Physics Lab Report
description: Document your findings from the motion experiment
instructions: Write a complete lab report including hypothesis, methodology, data analysis, and conclusion. Include all graphs and calculations.

title: Programming Assignment 1
description: Create a simple calculator program in Python
instructions: Implement a calculator that can perform basic arithmetic operations (+, -, *, /). Include error handling for division by zero. Submit your .py file.

title: Midterm Exam Review
instructions: Review all topics covered in chapters 1-5. This will be collected and checked for completion.

title: World War II Essay
description: Write an essay analyzing the causes of WWII
instructions: Minimum 800 words. Discuss at least three major causes and their interconnections.
